description: eDRV provides a cloud platform for managing electric vehicle charging stations and charging sessions over OCPP 1.6J and 2.0.1. It lets organizations integrate charging operations, device control, pricing, load management, and related workflows into their own applications.
summary: eDRV exposes one server-side REST API for EV charging management at https://api.edrv.io/v1.1, authenticated with an organization API key sent as a Bearer token.
